name: hajjma-mobile
description: Hajjma — Android app wrapping hajjma.onrender.com via Capacitor WebView.
author: Hajjma

scripts.build:debug: cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:release: cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.build:debug:win: cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleDebug
scripts.build:release:win: cap sync android && cd android && gradlew.bat assembleRelease
